task_text: Deterministic post-render visible-contract validator for Flyer Studio. The integrated image model draws all text; sometimes the delivered image violates the brief (leaked [price]/[rice] placeholder tokens, invented prices when none requested, $39.99 rendered as $99, Any item rendered as Every item, internal asset id B0002 visible, title ending in raw medium word flyer, requested catering/delivery/payment badges missing) yet the pipeline logs OUTCOME=sent. A vision read-back QA gate already exists (visual_qa.run_visual_qa -> _vision_text OCRs the rendered PNG via gpt-4o-mini -> extracted_text, runs on every send path before SEND/REROLL/ITERATION, already fails closed via a blockers list, already has PLACEHOLDER_RE + item:N price-pair presence + brand/phone/date checks). The live failures are GAPS in that gate. Fix = consolidate the missing concrete-fact/copy checks into ONE named visible_contract_validator driven by the locked facts / FlyerBrief / request, invoked from the single existing run_visual_qa chokepoint, appending blockers so the existing FAILCLOSED path handles it. Keep integrated renderer; do NOT reopen CD+overlay; do NOT weaken existing checks; do NOT re-enable broad subjective QA. Flag + allowlist scoped to +17329837841. Fail-closed message concise/useful. Hermes is creative brain; Python is deterministic referee.
